mapper.insert: insert into batch.batch_day_replay_session ( tenant_id, calendar_code, biz_date, scope, scope_payload, result_policy, config_version_policy, config_version, reason, approval_id, status, total_count, succeeded_count, failed_count, in_flight_count, requested_by, approved_by, started_at, completed_at, trace_id, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{calendarCode}, #{bizDate}, #{scope}, #{scopePayload,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{resultPolicy}, #{configVersionPolicy}, #{configVersion}, #{reason}, #{approvalId}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{succeededCount}, #{failedCount}, #{inFlightCount}, #{requestedBy}, #{approvedBy}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{traceId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select * from batch.batch_day_replay_session where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.update: update batch.batch_day_replay_session set succeeded_count = #{succeededCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, in_flight_count = #{inFlightCount}, total_count = #{totalCount}, updated_at = #{now} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
